scenario.title: Ravi Singapore messy call - canonical regression
scenario.description: Real call-style intake with mixed context, partial dates, and multi-generation party; used as canonical E2E regression through frontend proxy and backend async run ledger.

inputs.raw_note:
Hi Ravi, I got your number from my wife who is a colleague of Divya.
We are planning to visit Singapore sometime in Jan or Feb 2025.
Tentative dates around 9th to 14th Feb, approx 5 days.
Me, my wife, our 1.7 year old kid, and my parents would be going.
We don't want it rushed. Interested in Universal Studios and nature parks.
inputs.owner_note: Late-Nov call context; budget-conscious family, relaxed pace.

follow_up_questions.question: Please provide origin city to generate a quote.
Please provide budget raw text to generate a quote.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Stub — enrich with internal package lookup and preferred supplier data

sourcing_path.notes: Stub signal — no real supplier data available yet
